## Meeting Purpose

[Impromptu Zoom meeting to discuss Arjun's progress replicating Marcel's AI content workflow teachings and explore potential collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/sbu3vh-zs7g8TBs-xxCUaxxK3FQiE6av?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Arjun is struggling to define a clear vision and valuable use case for applying AI to summarize research papers](https://fathom.video/share/sbu3vh-zs7g8TBs-xxCUaxxK3FQiE6av?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
  - [Marcel advised focusing on a specific audience (e.g. marketers) and creating high-quality, contextualized content to build authority](https://fathom.video/share/sbu3vh-zs7g8TBs-xxCUaxxK3FQiE6av?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Marcel outlined his engagement process for helping clients set up an end-to-end AI content workflow](https://fathom.video/share/sbu3vh-zs7g8TBs-xxCUaxxK3FQiE6av?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
  - [Arjun shared Humanic's narrative-driven approach for using AI to generate marketing campaigns and sequences](https://fathom.video/share/sbu3vh-zs7g8TBs-xxCUaxxK3FQiE6av?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)

## Topics

### Arjun's Challenges Replicating the Workflow

  - [Difficulty defining a clear vision and valuable output](https://fathom.video/share/sbu3vh-zs7g8TBs-xxCUaxxK3FQiE6av?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
  - [Summarizing research papers leaves out important context](https://fathom.video/share/sbu3vh-zs7g8TBs-xxCUaxxK3FQiE6av?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [Need to experiment to find the right use case to provide value](https://fathom.video/share/sbu3vh-zs7g8TBs-xxCUaxxK3FQiE6av?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)

### Marcel's Advice on Finding a Use Case

  - [Focus on a specific audience like marketers](https://fathom.video/share/sbu3vh-zs7g8TBs-xxCUaxxK3FQiE6av?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Create contextualized, high-quality content resources they need](https://fathom.video/share/sbu3vh-zs7g8TBs-xxCUaxxK3FQiE6av?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Start small by covering niche topics with low competition](https://fathom.video/share/sbu3vh-zs7g8TBs-xxCUaxxK3FQiE6av?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [Celebrate small wins as you build authority](https://fathom.video/share/sbu3vh-zs7g8TBs-xxCUaxxK3FQiE6av?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)

### Marcel's Client Engagement Process

  - [Upfront strategy & research phase to define universe](https://fathom.video/share/sbu3vh-zs7g8TBs-xxCUaxxK3FQiE6av?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Build customized end-to-end AI content workflow](https://fathom.video/share/sbu3vh-zs7g8TBs-xxCUaxxK3FQiE6av?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Integrate with client's CMS and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/sbu3vh-zs7g8TBs-xxCUaxxK3FQiE6av?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
  - [Continual calibration and iteration based on results](https://fathom.video/share/sbu3vh-zs7g8TBs-xxCUaxxK3FQiE6av?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)

### Humanic's Narrative-Driven Approach

  - [Allow controlling entire marketing campaigns/sequences via narrative prompts](https://fathom.video/share/sbu3vh-zs7g8TBs-xxCUaxxK3FQiE6av?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [AI generates content like email sequences based on defined strategy](https://fathom.video/share/sbu3vh-zs7g8TBs-xxCUaxxK3FQiE6av?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)
  - [Contrasted with typical visual flow builders in marketing automation tools](https://fathom.video/share/sbu3vh-zs7g8TBs-xxCUaxxK3FQiE6av?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to introduce Arjun to Sam from his team working on narrative AI applications](https://fathom.video/share/sbu3vh-zs7g8TBs-xxCUaxxK3FQiE6av?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - [Explore potential collaboration between fwd.digital and Humanic](https://fathom.video/share/sbu3vh-zs7g8TBs-xxCUaxxK3FQiE6av?tab=summary&timestamp=1828.0)
